what_it_does: A preview card showing the ConceptV 'V' brand mark in three placement variants across three background panes: yellow V on canvas background, white V on gold background, and yellow V on dark background — each labelled with its placement tag.
observations: Carries a @dsCard annotation: group=Brand, name='V mark — three placements', subtitle 'Yellow on canvas · white on gold · yellow on dark', viewport='700x240'.
Three-column grid; each pane sets its background from a token (var(--bg-canvas), var(--accent-gold), var(--bg-dark)).
Uses two logo assets: conceptv-v-yellow.png (canvas + dark panes) and conceptv-v-white.png (gold pane).
Tag colours adapt per background (fg-muted on canvas, fg-primary on gold, semi-transparent cream on dark).
Logo rendered at a fixed 110x110px in each pane.
standouts: Encodes the brand-mark colour-on-background rules as three side-by-side demonstrations (which V colour to use on which surface).
Pane backgrounds are token-driven so the placements track the design system's actual colours.
conventions: Background colours from tokens (--bg-canvas, --accent-gold, --bg-dark) rather than literals.
Logos sourced from shared assets/logos rather than inline.
Uses a faint mix (rgba) for the dark-pane border and tag — minor literal use for hairline/opacity.
notes: A brand-mark card demonstrating the three sanctioned V placements (yellow-on-canvas, white-on-gold, yellow-on-dark) against token-driven backgrounds.
questions: Are there other sanctioned placements (e.g. on light/photographic backgrounds) beyond these three?
purpose_vs_actual: Match — the card states three V placements and shows exactly those three against their backgrounds.
intention_signals: Trying to fix the rules for how the V mark is coloured on each background so the logo stays legible and on-brand across canvas, gold, and dark surfaces.
contribution: Contributes the V-mark placement rules (which logo colour on which background) and the two logo asset variants (yellow / white) tied to token-driven backgrounds.
summary_for_embedding: A claude-ds Brand preview card showing the ConceptV V mark in three placements — yellow on canvas, white on gold, yellow on dark — against token-coloured backgrounds.
intention_for_embedding: To fix the rules for colouring the V brand mark on different backgrounds so it stays legible and on-brand across surfaces.
